clauses.heading: Payment Terms
clauses.text: Customer shall pay each undisputed invoice within thirty (30) days of receipt.

clauses.heading: Service Levels
clauses.text: Provider shall maintain 99.9% monthly availability; service credits apply below the threshold.

clauses.heading: Audit Rights
clauses.text: Customer may audit Provider's compliance records once per contract year upon fifteen (15) days written notice.

clauses.heading: Non-Solicitation
clauses.text: During the term and for twelve (12) months thereafter, neither party shall solicit the other's personnel.

clauses.heading: Term and Renewal
clauses.text: This Agreement renews for successive twelve (12) month terms unless either party gives ninety (90) days written notice of non-renewal.

clauses.heading: Termination for Convenience
clauses.text: Either party may terminate for convenience upon sixty (60) days written notice.

clauses.heading: Data Protection
clauses.text: Provider processes personal data solely as a processor; personal-data breaches are notified within seventy-two (72) hours; sub-processors require prior written approval.

extractions.summary: Customer pays each undisputed invoice within 30 days of receipt.
Provider maintains 99.9% monthly availability; service credits apply below the threshold.
Customer may audit Provider compliance records once per contract year on 15 days notice.
Non-solicitation of the other party's personnel for 12 months after the term.
Auto-renews for successive 12-month terms unless 90 days written notice of non-renewal.
Either party may terminate for convenience on 60 days written notice.
Provider acts as processor; 72-hour personal-data breach notification; sub-processor prior written approval required.
Customer to provide quarterly volume forecasts.
